lockingPolicy.lockReason: Guard-verification scenarios are the contractual proof of the governance baseline restoration; any future change to the scenario set requires explicit invalidation evidence per Gate G058/G059.

tdd.rationale: Artifact-only governance baseline restoration with zero runtime delta — no failing implementation test exists to drive red→green on; the state-transition-guard re-run IS the proof artifact. Red state captured in spec.md § Finding Ledger (40 atomic BLOCK lines across 7 finding classes F1-F7 at parent specs/014-discord-connector). Green state captured in report.md § Validation Evidence (state-transition-guard.sh on parent and bug packet both return Exit 0 TRANSITION PERMITTED with zero BLOCKs).

scenarios.title: Guard re-run on parent spec exits 0 with zero BLOCKs
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Exit 0 with 🟡 TRANSITION PERMITTED on parent spec 014-discord-connector; zero BLOCK lines in output; parent status=done ceiling preserved.

scenarios.title: Guard run on bug packet exits 0 with zero BLOCKs
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Exit 0 with 🟡 TRANSITION PERMITTED on the BUG-014-003 bug packet folder; zero BLOCK lines in output; bug status may be set to 'validated' (validate-to-doc ceiling).

scenarios.title: Zero runtime files modified in staged diff
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: git diff --cached --name-status emits only specs/014-discord-connector/{scopes.md,report.md,state.json}, the BUG-014-003 bug packet artifacts, and .specify/memory/sweep-2026-05-24-r10.json; zero matches for internal/connector/discord/**, config/**, .github/workflows/**, deploy/**, .github/bubbles/scripts/**, or docs/** paths.
